monitor.capture_what: Location header of the Flask Response object returned by redirect()

oracle_check.condition_description: The returned Response object has a Location header containing an http:// or https:// URL pointing to an external domain or IP, confirming that the user-provided request.url was passed through to the redirect without any allow-list or host validation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_URL-REDIRECTION: open redirect bypass detected — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
